title: gastrodia foetida
intro: Gastrodia foetida, also known as Chinese tiger's eye or stinking tongue orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to detoxify the body and promote blood circulation. The health benefits of Gastrodia foetida include its potential to alleviate symptoms of rheumatism, improve cognitive function, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Gastrodia foetida is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of decoctions, capsules, or tablets to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
